name: Hospital Construction Cost Calculator
shortBenefit: Estimate hospital project cost per bed and per sq ft (India).
intro: Estimate total project cost, cost per bed and cost per sq ft for a hospital in India — civil, MEP, HVAC, medical gas, equipment and contingency. Benchmarks tuned for 2026.

seo.title: Hospital Construction Cost Calculator India (2026) | Per Bed & Sq Ft | Varada Nexus
seo.description: Free hospital construction cost calculator for India. Estimate civil, MEP, HVAC, medical gas & equipment cost per bed and per sq ft. Instant project budget.

assumptions: Rates are indicative 2026 India planning assumptions, not quotes. Civil Rs 2,500–4,500/sq ft by grade; MEP 25%, HVAC 15%, medical gas + fire 8% of civil; equipment 0–55% of building; contingency 7%. City multipliers Metro 1.15 / Tier-2 1.00 / Tier-3 0.90. Editable in logic.js CONFIG.
disclaimer: This calculator provides a rough budgetary estimate for preliminary planning only. It does NOT constitute engineering, architectural, structural, financial, legal, or NABH/NABL advice and must not be used for tendering, funding or construction decisions. Obtain a validated, drawing-based estimate from qualified professionals. Varada Nexus accepts no liability for decisions made using this tool.

faq.q: What is the average hospital construction cost per bed in India?
faq.a: For a multispecialty hospital, all-in cost typically ranges Rs 25–60 lakh per bed depending on city tier, specialty mix, finishing and equipment. Civil work alone is usually Rs 2,500–4,500 per sq ft.

faq.q: How much built-up area is needed per hospital bed?
faq.a: General ~800–1,000 sq ft/bed, multispecialty ~1,000–1,200 sq ft/bed, super-specialty ~1,200–1,600 sq ft/bed including OTs, ICUs, diagnostics and support areas.

faq.q: Does this include medical equipment cost?
faq.a: Yes, optionally. Equipment for a multispecialty hospital typically adds 30–50% on top of building cost.
Land is optional and excluded by default. Enter a land value to see the full outlay.
